title: 'Entire trip was spectacular': Trump hails Artemis II crew, eyes Mars next
summary_full: Artemis II astronauts have successfully returned to Earth after a historic lunar flyby, setting a new distance record. President Trump lauded the crew's achievement and declared Mars as the next frontier for human space exploration. This mission tested crucial deep-space systems, paving the way for future lunar landings and ambitious journeys to the Red Planet.
